system_admin.routes
===================

.. py:module:: system_admin.routes

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   System administrator routes: user management, database reset, and documentation serving.

   All routes (except serve_sphinx_docs) require an authenticated session with
   role 'system_admin'. Routes are registered on the 'system_admin' blueprint
   under /system_admin.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   system_admin.routes.index
   system_admin.routes.view_users
   system_admin.routes.delete_user
   system_admin.routes.shutdown
   system_admin.routes.serve_sphinx_docs


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: index()

   Redirect the system admin to the application home page.


.. py:function:: view_users()

   Render a paginated list of all users in the system.

   Fetches id, first name, last name, email, and role for every user,
   ordered by ID.


.. py:function:: delete_user()

   Delete a user account by ID (POST only).

   Prevents the currently logged-in admin from deleting their own account.
   On success, removes the user row (cascading to related tables if
   foreign key constraints are configured) and flashes a confirmation.

   Requires: system_admin role.


.. py:function:: shutdown()

   Reset the database to a clean seed state and redirect to login.

   Removes the live database file and replaces it with the pre-seeded
   backup stored in the reset/ directory.

   Requires: system_admin role.


.. py:function:: serve_sphinx_docs(filename='index.html')

   Serve static files from the Sphinx HTML documentation build.

   Handles both the docs root (/docs/) and arbitrary sub-paths
   (/docs/<path>) by resolving files relative to docs/build/html/.

   :param filename: Path to the requested file within the build directory.
                    Defaults to 'index.html'.
   :type filename: str

   :returns: The requested static file served securely via send_from_directory.
   :rtype: Response
